title: 10 best herbal capsules for oily hair
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for oily hair are a natural supplement that contains a blend of herbs and botanicals specifically designed to help regulate sebum production, reducing oiliness and promoting healthy-looking locks. These capsules work by balancing the scalp's natural pH, soothing inflammation, and detoxifying the hair follicles. Examples include Biotin, Saw Palmetto, and Tea Tree Oil-based supplements that have been shown to reduce greasiness, improve manageability, and leave hair looking healthier and more vibrant.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosemary capsules helps with oily hair because they promote blood circulation to the scalp, which in turn stimulates the hair follicles to produce a healthy, natural oil balance. The antiseptic and antibacterial properties of rosemary also help to control excess sebum production, reducing dandruff and flaking. Additionally, rosemary's ability to improve hair growth and strength helps to reduce the appearance of oily roots, leaving hair looking healthier and more manageable.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Rosemary's antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress and damage to the hair follicles, promoting healthy scalp function and reducing oil production.
Stimulant properties: Rosemary's stimulant effects increase blood flow to the scalp, which helps to regulate sebum production and reduce excess oiliness, leading to a balanced hair growth cycle.
Astringent properties: Rosemary's astringent nature helps to constrict the pores on the scalp, reducing oil secretion and preventing clogged pores that can lead to oily hair.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in reducing dandruff and itchiness associated with oily hair.
Leaves: High in camphor and bornyl acetate, which help to balance sebum production, reduce flakiness, and promote healthy scalp conditions.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage capsules helps with oily hair because of their ability to balance the scalp's natural oil production. The herbal extract in sage capsules has antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce dandruff and itchiness, which can contribute to excessive oil secretion. Additionally, sage's astringent nature helps to dry out the scalp, reducing the appearance of greasiness and leaving hair feeling cleaner for longer. Regular use of sage capsules can result in a healthier-looking mane with reduced oiliness.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial properties: Sage has been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi on the scalp, which can help reduce dandruff, itchiness, and oil production, leading to a healthier scalp and less oily hair.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Sage's anti-inflammatory compounds can help soothe and calm irritated scalps, reducing redness and inflammation that can contribute to oily hair and dandruff.

Antioxidant properties: Sage's antioxidants can help neutralize free radicals on the scalp, which can damage hair follicles and lead to excess oil production, resulting in healthier, more balanced-looking hair.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to regulate oil production in the scalp, reducing dandruff and flaking.
Leaves: Sage leaves are rich in antioxidants and essential oils that help to balance the scalp's natural pH, reducing excessive oil secretion and promoting a healthy hair growth.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oregano capsules helps with oily hair because they contain natural antifungal and antibacterial properties that help to balance the scalp's natural pH levels, reducing oil production. The capsule's active ingredients also have astringent properties, which help to absorb excess sebum, leaving the hair feeling clean and refreshed. Additionally, oregano's antioxidant properties help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing the appearance of oily roots.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Oregano's antioxidants help neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, leading to excessive oil production and greasiness.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Oregano's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce redness and swelling in the scalp, which can contribute to oily hair by disrupting the natural balance of sebum production.
Antifungal and antibacterial properties: Oregano's antifungal and antibacterial compounds help combat fungal and bacterial overgrowth on the scalp, which can lead to oiliness and other scalp issues.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants, oregano roots help to reduce inflammation and soothe an itchy scalp associated with oily hair.
Flowers: Oregano flowers contain flavonoids that have a natural antibacterial property, which helps to control sebum production and reduce dandruff.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme capsules helps with oily hair because they contain thymol, a natural antiseptic that reduces the production of sebum in the scalp. This helps to control excessive oil secretion, leaving your hair looking cleaner and more manageable for longer periods. The capsules also have astringent properties, which help to tighten the pores on the scalp and reduce the appearance of grease and shine. As a result, thyme capsules can help to balance the natural moisture of oily hair and leave it feeling refreshed and revitalized.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial properties: Thyme's antibacterial properties help to combat scalp irritations and reduce dandruff, which can contribute to an overproduction of oil in the hair follicles.
